name: jcrt
description: Journal for Cultural and Religious Theory: A Whitestone Foundation Publication

scripts.build:bench: cross-env BENCH_11TY=1 BENCH_ISSUE=24.2 FAST_BUILD=1 ELEVENTY_RUN_MODE=serve NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 eleventy --quiet
scripts.build: rm -rf _site && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=8192 ELEVENTY_RUN_MODE=build eleventy && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=8192 node _config/minify-static.js && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=8192 node _config/generate-redirects.js && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=8192 node _config/run-pagefind.js
scripts.build:netlify: rm -rf _site && echo "[build:netlify 1/4] Eleventy build" && cross-env FAST_BUILD=1 LEAN_BUILD=1 NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=8192 ELEVENTY_RUN_MODE=build eleventy && echo "[build:netlify 2/4] Minify static assets" && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=8192 node _config/minify-static.js && echo "[build:netlify 3/4] Generate redirects" && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=8192 node _config/generate-redirects.js && echo "[build:netlify 4/4] Build Pagefind index" && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=8192 node _config/run-pagefind.js
scripts.build-ghpages: rm -rf _site && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=8192 eleventy --pathprefix=/jcrt.org/ && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=8192 node _config/generate-redirects.js
scripts.perf:benchmark:lean: cross-env DEBUG=Eleventy:Benchmark* FAST_BUILD=1 LEAN_BUILD=1 ELEVENTY_RUN_MODE=build eleventy --quiet
